result.stdout:
USAGE:
    PYLON-CLI.dll [OPTIONS] <COMMAND>

EXAMPLES:
    PYLON-CLI.dll workareas --copy
    PYLON-CLI.dll workareas --remove
    PYLON-CLI.dll db --show
    PYLON-CLI.dll db --bak
    PYLON-CLI.dll config --show

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help       Prints help information   
    -v, --version    Prints version information

COMMANDS:
    workareas     
    db            
    services      
    config        
    help

result.stdout:
USAGE:
    PYLON-CLI.dll config [OPTIONS]

EXAMPLES:
    PYLON-CLI.dll config --show
    PYLON-CLI.dll config --copy
    PYLON-CLI.dll config --remove
    PYLON-CLI.dll config --edit

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help      Prints help information 
        --show      Show system config table
        --copy      Copy system config      
        --remove    Remove system config    
        --edit      Edit system config

result.stdout:
USAGE:

EXAMPLES:
    PYLON-CLI.dll db --show
    PYLON-CLI.dll db --bak

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                 Prints help information 
        --show                 Show available databases
        --bak                  Back up databases       
        --pbak <BACKUPPATH>    Back up databases       
        --delete [DAYS]        Back up databases
